title: Our First Trip
description: The most magical week of our lives. Croissants at sunrise, wandering through art-filled streets, and falling in love with every cobblestone corner.

title: Temples & Tea
description: Golden leaves falling around ancient temples. We shared matcha under a maple tree and promised to come back every autumn.

title: Midnight in Manhattan
description: Counting down to the new year surrounded by a million lights. The city was loud but all I heard was your laugh.

title: When in Rome
description: Gelato by the Trevi Fountain, getting lost in narrow streets, and making wishes together under the Italian sun.
